content.en:
Ye Tian also traded the location of this ancient nest, after all, it didn't cost too many resources, so there was no need to save this resource.

"It's here!"

Ye Tian was surprised.

This ancient nest is located near the black mountain in the silent Black Sea, which is already very dangerous, and the ancient nest is very hidden, so it has only been discovered so far, and it is very normal.

He was very curious about how Mingyu Dao Ancestor discovered this ancient nest!

But one thing is very certain, that is, that ancient nest is very dangerous, and Mingyu Daozu does not dare to enter it, otherwise he will not sell the location of that ancient nest.

......

Swire Daomeng.

Ye Tian returned here first, and then used the Dao Gate of the Ancient Dao Alliance to go to a new district boundary closest to Montenegro.

This new district boundary is called the Youhe District Boundary, and if the district boundary is born not long ago, the Dao Ancestors of the outside world will enter it, and their strength will be suppressed.

This is the term of protection of regional boundaries, and the same is true for many worlds and boundaries.

Due to the weakness of the Youhe boundary, each major district boundary will place one of the connection points of the Dao Gate in the Youhe District boundary, and the Youhe District boundary cannot resist.

Airplanes!!!

Ye Tian shuttled through the Dao Gate to the boundary of the Youhe District, which saved the time of rushing in the Silent Black Sea.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian tore through the barrier of the Youhe District boundary and entered the Silent Black Sea, and he had to shuttle himself to the ancient nest for the rest of the journey.

And this journey is not short, many Dao Ancestors who are not strong do not dare to shuttle all the time, and they stay and transit at the boundaries of one district after another, and slowly go to the location of the ancient nest.

Otherwise, staying too long in the Silent Black Sea will attract very powerful primordial antiquities, and it will be troublesome.

And Ye Tian didn't worry about this problem, he shuttled directly to the ancient nest.

One Origin Domain Day after another passed, and Ye Tian encountered many attacks by Primordial Antiquities during the period, but they were all killed by him one by one.

Finally, Ye Tian rushed to the location of the ancient nest.

At this time, he found that fighting was already breaking out here.

"It's those half-step sevenfold ancestors!"

Ye Tian recognized it.

These half-step sevenfold ancestors had many Dao Gates, and they must have more connection points than the Ancient Dao Alliance, so they could come here faster.

Not only that, but there are also some sixfold peak ancestors, who should also come with them.

Abrupt.

The body of a six-fold peak ancestor exploded directly, and was directly grabbed by a half-step sevenfold ancestor and thrown towards another part of the Silent Black Sea, leaving the battlefield.

After the sixfold peak ancestor was thrown out, he quickly recovered his body, but his breath was much weaker.

"The Dao Ancestors at the peak of the Sixfold Origin Ancestor have all been hit hard, these Yuan Shen Drums are not simple!"

Ye Tian soon came to the ancient nest and sensed the dense Yuanshen Drum.

These Genshin drums erupted in unison, and these vibrations could actually merge together and erupt into terrifying attacks.

"I see!"

Ye Tian completely understood.

A single Yuanshen drum is not powerful, but when it is stacked, it is extremely powerful!

Once the weak Dao Ancestor enters here, he will be directly killed instantly.

Moreover, even if it was a half-step sevenfold ancestor, he didn't dare to go directly into this ancient nest, otherwise it would be dangerous.

As a result, these Dao Ancestors slowly consumed these Yuan Shen Drums.

Soon, some more Dao Ancestors came.

"Let's attack together, otherwise after staying in the Silent Black Sea for a long time, there will be other primordial antiquities coming, and the primordial antiquities will hardly fight each other, and then we will be in trouble!"

A half-step sevenfold ancestor proposed.

"Okay, let's attack the inside of this ancient nest together!"

Many Dao Ancestors made a move with all their strength and entered the interior of the Ancient Live.

The inside of the ancient nest is like another void, but the suppression of many Dao Ancestors is very great, but it is still within the range of bearing.

Thundered!!!!

The Great War has broken out!

Ye Tian also killed in, and he himself was also attacked by the concussion attack of the Yuan Shen Drum, but his physical body was very strong, and the Endless Yuan Dao prototype also protected him.

Therefore, he would not be like those sixfold peak ancestors, who were shocked to the ground.

I saw that Ye Tian directly killed a group of Yuanshen drums, killed some Yuanshen drums in an instant, and immediately took away a drop of black liquid.

After all, the strength of these Yuanshen Drums is not good, and the most powerful is only comparable to the peak of the Sixfold Primordial Ancestor, and it does not have the same resilience as the primordial ancients.

In a short period of time, the Yuan Shen Drum was killed a lot, and the Dao Ancestor also fell some.

After all, some Dao Ancestors did not have the support of a half-step Sevenfold Origin Ancestor, once their flesh was shattered, a heavy shock attacked, and they had no time to recover, and the Extreme Dao Will was completely crushed.

Therefore, there are many Dao Ancestors who fell because of greed this time!

Some Dao Ancestors are even the strongest in some district realms, and now they have also fallen here, and the strength and status of many district boundaries are afraid that they will be greatly reduced.

Of course, the surviving Dao Ancestor will make a lot of money, and he will get a large amount of black liquid at once, even if he doesn't use it, if he uses it to cultivate disciples, he can cultivate a demonic genius!

And some Dao Ancestors who are at the peak of the Sixfold Origin Ancestor are already very close to comprehending the Yuan Dao, and some have even comprehended the prototype of the Yuan Dao, this time they may be able to use these black liquids to directly comprehend the true Yuan Dao, so as to achieve the half-step Sevenfold Origin Ancestor realm.

At that time, this area can add a few more half-step sevenfold ancestors.

After another while, all of these primordial drums were killed, and the entire ancient nest began to collapse.

"The Ancient Lair is going to collapse, get out of here!"

One by one, Dao Ancestors began to shuttle away frantically.

The consequences of the collapse of the Ancient Nest, they are all very clear, once the Ancient Nest completely collapses, this place will be distorted, and if the Dao Ancestor does not leave, he will be teleported to an unknown area.

In short, the Dao Ancestor who had distorted and disappeared with the ancient nest before never came back.

For the unknown situation, no one dares to try, so naturally choose to leave.

In an instant, all the Dao Ancestors came out.

"Hurry back to the boundary!"

One Dao Ancestor returned as fast as he could.

However, in the silent Black Sea void, a statue of the primordial ancients appeared.

Obviously, these Dao Ancestors had been in the Silent Black Sea for too long, attracting other primordial artifacts.

Previously, they were inside the Nest, so these primordial artifacts could not enter.

But now, as soon as they came out, they were immediately perceived by the original antiquities.

At this time.

Ye Tian was also targeted by some primordial antiquities, and he had no idea of continuing to fight, so he fled directly while fighting.

After a long time, Ye Tian came to the nearest district boundary and escaped directly into it.
